protein_name: Promotes the exchange of Ras-bound GDP by GTP. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: guanyl-nucleotide exchange factor activity; protein binding; protein heterodimerization activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: insulin receptor signaling pathway; Ras protein signal transduction; small GTPase-mediated signal transduction
